source: FDA 2024 ADC Guidance; T-DM1 BLA review; CKAP5 hepatotoxicity mechanism (2016)
description: Maytansinoid payloads (DM1 with non-cleavable SMCC linker; DM4 with disulfide SPDB linker) cause G2/M arrest via microtubule disruption. Primary DLTs: thrombocytopenia (via lys-SMCC-DM1 metabolite) and hepatotoxicity (dual HER2-dependent and CKAP5 mechanism). Used in: trastuzumab emtansine (T-DM1), mirvetuximab soravtansine.

expected_findings.description: Thrombocytopenia (primary clinical DLT for maytansinoid ADCs)
expected_findings.severity_threshold: PLAT <50% baseline with hemorrhage = adverse. NOTE: cyno underestimates clinical thrombocytopenia for DM1 class — primary clinical DLT.
expected_findings.rationale: Lys-SMCC-DM1 metabolite inhibits megakaryocyte differentiation independently of target antigen.
expected_findings.translation_gap: Cyno mild thrombocytopenia → clinical DLT. Primary clinical DLT for T-DM1.

expected_findings.description: Hepatotoxicity (dual mechanism: target-mediated internalization + CKAP5 binding)
expected_findings.rationale: Dual mechanism: HER2-mediated internalization + HER2-independent CKAP5 binding in hepatocytes.

expected_findings.severity_threshold: Any corneal finding beyond minimal = adverse for DM4. DM1 ocular toxicity is less prominent.
expected_findings.payload_subclass_note: DM4 ADCs (SPDB disulfide linker) have significantly higher ocular toxicity than DM1 ADCs. DM4 metabolites have greater lipophilicity leading to greater corneal epithelial penetration. Ophthalmologic exams required.
expected_findings.rationale: Corneal epithelial macropinocytosis of maytansinoid metabolites.
On-target when target expressed on peripheral nerve glia (e.g., RET, HER2 on glial cells).

expected_findings.severity_threshold: Diffuse mucosal injury with hemorrhage = adverse
expected_findings.rationale: More prominent than auristatins at equivalent doses.
Hematopoietic progenitor cytotoxicity from maytansinoid microtubule disruption.

expected_findings.severity_threshold: LVEF decline >10% from baseline or below institutional LLN = adverse. Only applicable to HER2-directed ADCs.
expected_findings.rationale: HER2 signaling is essential for cardiomyocyte maintenance. Cardiac dysfunction is antibody-mediated (not payload). Only applicable to HER2-directed maytansinoid ADCs (T-DM1).
expected_findings.translation_gap: Cyno cardiac findings are subtle; clinical cardiomyopathy is the primary concern. Troponin monitoring recommended.
